---
title: "Callout Variants"
id: "mod001-se01-sec06-sp01"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec06"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---











---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Introduce why this point matters._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.callout-note}
**Key Emphasis**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the emphasized point, warning, or key takeaway here._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add interpretation or implications of this point._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Introduce why this point matters._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.callout-tip}
**Key Emphasis**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the emphasized point, warning, or key takeaway here._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add interpretation or implications of this point._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Introduce why this point matters._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.callout-warning}
**Key Emphasis**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the emphasized point, warning, or key takeaway here._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add interpretation or implications of this point._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Introduce why this point matters._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.callout-important}
**Key Emphasis**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the emphasized point, warning, or key takeaway here._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add interpretation or implications of this point._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Variant Showcase</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec06-sp02.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Quiz Variants</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
